scope_boundary: Bounded local live repository attestation over one selected produced artifact only. The probe compares filesystem bytes, git object bytes, and command replay for the clean tracked record-reality sequence result, rejects seven mutation controls, and records attestation limits. It is not a deployed attestation service, not open-world receipt faithfulness, not external review, not verifier-correctness evidence, and not an upward support-state transition.
transition_reason: The live attestation probe is useful because it moves the record-reality lane one step beyond stored receipt audit and deterministic challenge: one current repository artifact is checked through separate filesystem, git-object, and command-replay routes while trap and support-promotion controls remain rejected. The evidence remains local and bounded, so it blocks promotion for deployed attestation, open-world receipt faithfulness, verifier correctness, external project truth, deployed audit behavior, or chapter-core support.
required_artifacts: deployed or externally reviewable attestation service trace
public-safe produced artifact with parent job, source/context set, context transaction, semantic certificate, replay declaration, residual declaration, evidence gate, and claim/test link
independent attestation route outside the producing component
trap receipt or challenge suite executed outside the attested component
external review of verifier-quality and attestation limits
accepted evidence-transition record for any narrowed upward support movement
negative_results: git blob digest mismatch is rejected
wrong-digest trap receipt acceptance is rejected
support promotion from attestation shape is rejected
no chapter core claim is promoted
downgrade_triggers: same-component self-check accepted as independent attestation
support-state promotion accepted from attestation shape
fixture described as deployed attestation or open-world receipt faithfulness
promotion_burden: Move above argument only for a narrowed artifact-attestation claim after deployed or externally reviewable attestation traces, independent observer routes, trap/challenge execution outside the producing component, verifier-quality evidence, provenance completeness review, residuals, non-claims, and external or independent review are recorded with a separate accepted transition.
limitations: bounded local live repository attestation only
does not create an upward support-state transition

does not promote the Artifact Graphs chapter core claim
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent attestation, audit, verifier-quality, source-interpretation, external-project, or external human review
acceptance_blockers: no deployed or externally reviewable attestation service trace
no independent attestation route outside the producing component
